creator: skrabban@gmail.com
text:
Original patch did not build on 10-CURRENT and left gjdoc/gjdoc.1
behind from classpath.
Build jars with zip instead of fastjar and add gjdoc/gjdoc.1 to
pkg-plist/Makefile.

Updated patch, new status:

Sucessfully built on:
10-CURRENT/amd64
10-CURRENT/i386
9.0-RELEASE/amd64
9.0-RELEASE/i386
8.2-RELEASE/amd64
8.2-RELEASE/i386
7.4-RELEASE/amd64
7.4-RELEASE/i386
and
8.1-RELEASE/sparc64
